text:
```json
{
  "stepType": "DRAG_FILL",
  "stepTitle": "Challenge: Apply Quiz",
  "moduleTitle": "Module 1: Unveiling the Basics - Computer Hardware & Software Fundamentals",
  "courseTitle": "IT Passport Exam Prep: Your Journey into the Digital World",
  "lessonText": "Test your knowledge of computer hardware and software fundamentals by filling in the blanks.",
  "data": {
    "challenges": [
      {
        "instruction": "Drag the correct terms to complete the sentences about hardware and software, using what you learned about their definitions.",
        "codeTemplate": "The CPU is an example of __________, while the Operating System is an example of __________.",
        "options": [
          "Hardware",
          "Software",
          "Firmware",
          "Middleware"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "Hardware,Software",
        "explanation": "Hardware refers to the physical components, like the CPU. Software is the set of instructions, like the Operating System, that makes the hardware work."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Complete the sentence about the roles of hardware and software, using your understanding of their functions.",
        "codeTemplate": "__________ are the physical parts of a computer, while __________ tells the hardware what to do.",
        "options": [
          "Software",
          "Hardware",
          "Peripherals",
          "Applications"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "Hardware,Software",
        "explanation": "Hardware provides the physical structure, and software provides the instructions for the hardware to execute tasks."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Fill in the blanks to differentiate between hardware and software components in a computer system, based on their roles.",
        "codeTemplate": "RAM (Random Access Memory) is considered __________, and an example of __________ is Windows 10.",
        "options": [
          "Hardware",
          "Software",
          "Freeware",
          "Shareware"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "Hardware,Software",
        "explanation": "RAM is a physical component, thus hardware. Windows 10 is a set of instructions, thus software."
      }
    ]
  }
}
```
